raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 689 will support the expansion of domestic violence crisis hotline services to include computer chat and phone text platforms.",
    "The Covid-19 pandemic has caused a dramatic increase in California's rates of domestic violence.",
    "The National Domestic Violence Hotline saw a 9% increase in calls, texts, and chats during the pandemic.",
    "Text and chat options will expand access and safety for individuals experiencing domestic violence at home.",
    "Laura's House has implemented a secure chat line platform which has proven effective in reaching youth and young adults.",
    "Modernizing domestic violence shelter requirements to include technological platforms will allow centers to help more victims.",
    "AB 689 will enable the state to track and collect more accurate data about domestic abuse."
  ]
}
```
